questionHtml:
What happens in the acrosome reaction?

A.  Enzymes digest the zona pellucida around an ovum, allowing a sperm to enter.

B.  Enzymes digest the binding proteins of the zona pellucida so that no more sperm enter.

C.  Acrosomes release binding proteins to the zona pellucida for sperm entrance.

D.  Acrosomes react with the cortical granules to allow fertilization.

meta.title: What happens in the acrosome reaction? A. Enzymes digest the zona pellucida around an ovum, allowing a sperm to enter. B. Enzymes digest the binding proteins of the zona pellucida
